profile.innate_zh: 执行力极强、目标导向、细节控
profile.learned_zh: 本科就开始发论文的超前节奏塑造了极强竞争意识
profile.learned_en: Publishing papers since undergrad bred fierce competitiveness
profile.belief_zh: 在学术界，数量和质量都不能少
profile.belief_en: In academia you need both quantity and quality
profile.goal_en: PhD offer from a top overseas school
profile.contradiction_zh: 明知内卷不健康 vs 停不下来
profile.contradiction_en: Knows over-competition is unhealthy vs. can't stop
profile.deep_zh: 对失败的恐惧驱动着一切行为
profile.deep_en: Every move driven by fear of failure
profile.lifestyle_zh: 军事化作息，精确到分钟
profile.rhythm_zh: 全天高产出，但周末会突然崩溃一次
profile.rhythm_en: High output all day, one crash per weekend
profile.short_goal_zh: 今天把实验对比表格整理完
profile.constraint_zh: 合作者拖延了数据标注进度；身体有些不舒服
profile.constraint_en: Collaborator delayed labeling; body feels off
profile.bias_zh: 倾向把别人的放松看成懈怠；高估自己身体承受极限
profile.bias_en: Sees others' rest as slacking; overestimates her physical limits
profile.narrative_en: Rest is an excuse for the weak
